arts.ttl: Millwall boss made no attempt to dial down pressure for crunch Championship clash
arts.sum: “I spoke to the players about the importance of the game,” said Neil, pictured right, talking after the fixture at Fratton Park. Alex Neil did not try and play down the importance of Millwall’s 1-0 win over Portsmouth on Tuesday night – admitting he told his players beforehand exactly how high the stakes were.

arts.ttl: Preview: Millwall vs. Queens Park Rangers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Millwall and Queens Park Rangers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Millwall agree deal for Championship striker prospect
arts.sum: Millwall have signed Middlesbrough forward Ajay Matthews. “We’re delighted to welcome an exciting talent in Ajay Matthews to the club,” said Millwall director of football Steve Gallen.

arts.ttl: Colchester United youngsters see off Millwall in fine home victory
arts.sum: After a nice one-two, the Millwall left-back saw his shot saved by Jack Sexton while Elkanah Akor's high cross into the box saw the away keeper struggle to tip it around the post. Soon after that, Rash Drysdale saw his deflected shot saved and as the visitors broke well, the left winger got into the box but there was some superb covering back by Ronnie Harvey.
